title: SpaceCraft Pluto
description:
A brand new, lightweight Fabric 1.20.1 modpack based around Space Exploration!
(Space Core would be proud!)

Issues and community discussions on GitHub :D
body:
A brand-new, lightweight Fabric 1.20.1 modpack designed around Space Exploration!  
(Space Core would be proud :D)

This pack uses Ad Astra, a great space mod that adds various different planets to explore. Paired with Create, this makes for a great experience!  

This pack is good for both single and multiplayer!

Have fun!
-StikyPiston :D
